title: Signal Landscape: PM operating workflows

signal_clusters.cluster_summary: Customer evidence continues to point to reporting and coordination burden as the dominant pain cluster.

signals.signal_summary: PMs are spending increasing time synthesizing fragmented signals rather than making decisions.

signal_clusters.cluster_summary: Competitor evidence suggests bundled workflow platforms are strong in delivery linkage but weaker in trusted synthesis.

signals.signal_summary: Connected workflows reduce friction but still leave PMs stitching the broader picture together elsewhere.

decision_watchlist: Track whether enterprise buyers prioritize traceability over bundled convenience.
